title: Ticket
description: A coordination Activity that drives ONE cell maturity transition. The board column is `state`; the knowledge effect is `target_transition`. Ticket `done` implies the target cell advances, gated by gate-signal. `target_cell` is a Cell id (the computed {layer}.{scope}.{slug}); `acceptance.rubric_cell` must itself be a validated rubric cell.

id.description: Coordination identity: {tkt|epic|iss}-{ULID}. Identity excludes lifecycle state.

type.description: Routes triage and gating. issue = untriaged observation; epic = roadmap container. prompt/instruction = free-form intake with no target_cell until handled — a prompt is triaged into structured tickets; an instruction is folded into the loop's guidance buffer. All three are denied draft->active until triaged (gate-ticket-ready).

state.description: Lifecycle position = Kanban column. Every change is a ledgered transition guarded by a gate. `claimed` is set by the dispatcher only (single-writer).

target_cell.description: The Cell id ({layer}.{scope}.{slug}) this ticket advances. Required once triaged (absent only for untriaged issues).

target_transition.description: The maturity morphism this ticket performs. Must be legal in the maturity state machine (transition_ok).

acceptance.description: Doneness bound to a VALIDATED rubric cell — not prose. gate-ticket-ready checks the rubric is itself validated.

rubric_cell.description: Cell id of the bound rubric.

tickets.description: Ticket ids that must reach done first.

cells_ready.description: Cell ids that must be validated (partial-order readiness).

priority.description: Compass inputs. probe_cost is read from the ledger once history exists; estimated on cold start.

unlock.description: Count of cells/tickets this one unblocks (graph-computed).

probe_cost.description: Tokens/iterations per prior signal for this cell type.

claim.description: Set by the dispatcher ONLY. Workers never self-claim (the claim race is designed out, not mitigated).

lease_expiry.description: Lease for crash recovery; expiry returns the ticket to active.

signal_refs.description: Populated by the critic at in-review->done. A worker cannot write these (gate-signal).

ledger_refs.description: Ledger entries for every transition this ticket underwent.

superseded_by.description: Ticket id, if cancelled in favor of another.

timestamps.description: created, updated, and per-state entry times for flow metrics.
